Off Calendar Feb-06-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sheldon Wolfe for Rhonda Stallings. Maria Bellafronto for Animal Legal Defense Fund ("ALDF"). Joyce Tishler was also present.

Mr. Wolfe explained circumstances and services renderred to support his fees. Ms. Bellafronto expressed that fees requested by Mr. Wolfe were excessive and that the services were not extraordinary. The accounting petition was taken under submission. Mr. Wolfe is to file a supplement.

Judge: Lillian Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Dec-22-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Eugene Hahm for Rhonda Stallings (Petitioner) and for San Francisco SPCA (Beneficiary). Maria Bellafronto for Animal Legal Defense Fund.

Mr. Hahm addressed the issues raised by the Court with regard to the Court's knowledge of multiple wills, conflict with his representation of Ms. Stallings, the SPCA and Mr. Wong, and the right to claim extraordinary fees. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Kendall.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Oct-27-2011 Continued To Dec-14-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-26-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Eugene Hom for San Francisco SPCA, Rhonda Stallings and Henry Wong. Maria Bellafronto for Animal Legal Defense Fund.

Counsel has no issue with the Court's tentative ruling. The tentative ruling is adopted as follows: Tentative Rulings on (1) Stalling's Demurrer to Signorini's Will Contest to Petition to Probate October 11, 2001 Will, and, (2) Stalling's Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings on Signorini's Petition for Probate of Decedent's March 10, 2007 Will.
On September 17, 2010 Petitioner Rhonda Stallings filed a Petition to Probate the October 11, 2001 Will of Irene Atacheff. On November 15, 2010 Respondent Signorini filed a Will Contest to the Petition. Stallings' Demurrer to Signorini's Will Contest is sustained without leave to amend. Signorini has no standing to challenge the 2001 Will. (Estate of Reeves (1991) 233 Cal.App.3d 651, 658.)
On August 6, 2010 Petitioner Signorini filed an Amended Petition to Probate Decedent's Will dated March 10, 2007. Stalling's Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings on Anthony Signorini's Petition for Probate of Decedent's March 10, 2007 Will is Granted. Signorini lacks standing as an interested person to Petition to administer decedent's estate. (Probate Code section 8000, Estate of Reeves (1991) 233 Cal.App.3d 651, 658.)
The Court makes the following Orders on Stallings' Request for Judicial Notice attached to her Demurrer to Signorini's Will Contest of the October 11, 2001 Will and attached to the Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings on Signorini's Petition for Probate of Decedent's March 10, 2007 Will.
1. Register of Actions: The Court takes judicial notice of the listings contained in the Register of Actions in In re Conservatorship of Irene Atacheff, Case No. PCN-08-290840.
2. Order After Hearing Restraining Elder or Dependent Adult Abuse, filed July 8, 2009, Case No. PCN-08-290840: The Court takes judicial notice of the Order.
3. Petition for Dissolution of Marriage, filed July 28, 2009, Case No. FDI-09-770278. The Court takes judicial notice of the Petition.
4. Proof of Service of Summons, filed August 14, 2009, Case No. FDI-09-770278: The Court takes judicial notice of the filing of the Proof of Service but not of the contents.
5. Amended Petition for Dissolution of Marriage, filed September 24, 2009; Case No. FDI-09-770278: The Court takes judicial notice of the filing of the Amended Petition but not of the contents.
6. Proof of Service of Summons with executed Notice and Acknowledgment of Receipt filed October 1, 2009, Case No. FDI-09-770278: The Court takes judicial notice of the filing of the Proof of Service but not of the contents.
7. Request to Enter Default, filed January 14, 2010, Case No. FDI-09-770278: The Court takes judicial notice of the filing of the Request but not of the contents.
8. Declaration of Default or Uncontested Dissolution, filed January 14, 2010, Case No. FDI-09-770278: The Court takes judicial notice of the filing of the Declaration but not of the contents.
9. Judgment of Dissolution, filed January 27, 2010, Case No. FDI-09-770278: The Court takes judicial notice of the Order.
10. Notice of Entry of Judgment of Dissolution, filed January 27m 2010, Case No. FDI-09-770278: The Court takes judicial notice of the filing of the Notice but not of the contents.

Mr. Signiorini's Petition for Probate is taken off calendar. Ms. Stallings Petition for Probate was taken under submission for review of the proposed order.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Eugene Hom for Rhonda Stallings, San Francisco SPCA, Henry Wong and Animal Legal Defense Fund. Anne-Leith Matlock for and with Antonio Signorini.

Off Calendar Nov-17-2010 Continued To Jan-06-11 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-17-2010 Continued To Jan-06-11 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PCN-08-290840 Conservatorship of Irene Atacheff.

Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for and with Andrea Leung (Petitioner/Conservator). Anne-Leith Matlock for and with Antonio Signorini. Eugene Hahm for San Francisco SPCA.

Ms. Matlock requested that the Court strike the objection filed on November 12, 2010. The Court did not rule on Ms. Matlock's request and stated that it would take a look at it. Mr. Siracusa and Mr. Hahm objected to Mr. Signorini being present at the hearing stating that he has no standing. Mr. Siracusa addressed all of Mr. Signorini's objections and provided case history. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. Mr. Hahm stated that he would be filing some form of a demurrer as to the will contest and a dispositive motion to Mr. Signorini's petition on the legal basis that he has no standing as an interested party. The accounting petition on the conservatorship matter was taken under submission. The petitions for probate of will were continued to January 6, 2011 at 2:00 p.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Hahm's motion is to be heard on that date as well.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Aguirre.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-13-2010 Continued To Nov-17-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for Andrea Leung (Special Administrator). Marc Shishido (Tenant) in Propria Persona. Eugene Hahm for Will Contestants. Anne-Leith Marlock for and with Antonio Signorini.

Ms. Marlock stated that she just substituted in last week and that the supplement to the petition will be filed today. Mr. Hahm stated that the will contest was served on Mr. Signorini today. Mr. Shishido spoke of tenancy issues. Mr. Hahm objected to Mr. Shishido appearing on this matter stating that he was not an interested Party and that he had no standing. The matter was continued to November 17, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.
